name: Castle
description: Castle protects user accounts and transactions from takeover, fraudulent signups and abusive usage with a developer-first API. It offers risk scoring, device fingerprinting, webhooks and policies, and is popular with SaaS companies like Sho

seo.title: Castle — Fraud & Risk Management
seo.meta_description: Castle: Castle protects user accounts and transactions from takeover, fraudulent signups and abusive usage with a developer-first API. It offers risk scoring, d

when_to_use: Risk scoring for new user signup abuse prevention
Account takeover detection via device fingerprint changes
SaaS platform abuse policy enforcement via webhooks
Fraud signal enrichment for Shopify checkout flows
Adaptive MFA trigger based on real-time risk score

pros: Developer-first API with clear docs and webhooks
Policies let you codify risk rules without retraining
Fast integration for SaaS login and signup flows
cons: Weaker on payment fraud vs PSP-native tools
Smaller data network than LexisNexis or Ekata
Requires you to tune rules and thresholds yourself
Limited out-of-box bot mitigation vs DataDome
review.verdict: The right pick for SaaS teams that want ATO and signup protection via API without an enterprise contract.
review.best_for: B2B and B2C SaaS protecting logins, signups and workspace abuse with a small risk team.
review.not_for: Payment-first merchants or bot-heavy retail needing dedicated WAF-layer mitigation.
